dataset_description: In-house MDD T1w MRI dataset with 120 participants (60 patients, 60 healthy controls), collected at 3T using standard MPRAGE sequence. VBM analysis pipeline available.
notes: Our lab has extensive experience with morphometry analyses in depression. We have matching demographic data and can attempt a direct replication.

dataset_description: Multi-site Japanese cohort T1w MRI data including MDD patients and healthy controls (N=200 total). Includes VBM and surface-based morphometry outputs.
notes: We have partial overlap with the required data types. Our sample includes MDD and HC groups with T1w MRI but may not match exact demographic criteria.

institution: Max Planck Institute for Human Cognitive and Brain Sciences
dataset_description: Adolescent neurodevelopment cohort with T1w MRI (N=150), including hope and well-being assessments. Gray matter volume data available.
notes: Our dataset covers neurostructural correlates in late adolescence with relevant morphometry data. Exploratory replication possible with some methodological adaptations.
